text:
It was a beautiful evening, just like any other. Maggie stared out her window at the cherry blossoms in her garden. Her favorite book was waiting for her.

So she sat down indoors. That's where she read all night until dawn. When she finished, she didn asleep on the big loveseat.

When she woke up, she looked everywhere for her book. But it was gone. Maybe it was stolen from the window? Maggie nibbled her lips pensively.

She went downstairs. Cat burglar? Nope. Nobody even knew her. That didn't make sense.

Perhaps someone knew them? Probably. Why would they know Maggie?

Maybe because she knew them?

That wasn't right. Maybe.
